version_description: Kenny Loggins was born in Everett,Washington and was greatly known for his soundtrack songs ,most notably Footloose 1984 ,Top gun with Danger Zone 1986 and Nobody,s Fool from Caddyshack 2 1988 .You Tube link to this song https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U8SSdyflGN4 Which users may find easier to play with capo on 3rd fret tranpose these chords - 3.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Kenny Loggins - This Is It    1979

Key:Gm    BPM:104    You Tube Link:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=U8SSdyflGN4

Capo 3    Transpose -3   for easier chords
------------------------------------------
Chords for use No Capo
[ch]Gm7[/ch]     353333     [ch]C9[/ch]     x32330    [ch]Cmaj9[/ch]      x3133x
[ch]Eb[/ch]      xx1343     [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  103210    [ch]D7[/ch]         xx0212
[ch]Cm7[/ch]     x35343     [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch] x13231    [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]     465544
[ch]Dm7[/ch]     xx0211     [ch]Am7[/ch]    x02010    [ch]Gsus4[/ch]      330013
[ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  x65333     [ch]Bmaj9[/ch]  x2132x    [ch]G[/ch]          320033
[ch]Edim7[/ch]   012323     [ch]Bb[/ch]     x10331    [ch]F[/ch]          133211
[ch]Eb/F[/ch]    xx3343                      [ch]Em7[/ch]        020030
[ch]F#dim7[/ch]  xx1212                      [ch]Dm9[/ch]        x3133x
                                    [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]      x32000

   [Intro]
[ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]
[ch]Gm[/ch]    [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]     [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Gm[/ch]   [ch]Gm7[/ch]


   [Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]                              [ch]Eb[/ch]
There have been times in my life,I've spent wondering why[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]           [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch] [ch]Edim7[/ch]         [ch]Eb/F[/ch]
Still somehow I believed, we'd always survive[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#dim7[/ch]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Now I'm not so sure,[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]                     [ch]Dm7[/ch]
You're waiting to hear,One good reason to try[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Edim7[/ch]          [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]F#dim7[/ch]
Lord what more can I say,  What's left to provide[/tab]


   [Pre Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]C9[/ch]         [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]      [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
You think that maybe it's over[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]          [ch]Bbmaj9[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]
Only if you want it to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Are you gonna wait for a sign,your miracle[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]     [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Or  stand up and fight[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Cm9[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]             [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
This is  it, make no mistake where you are[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]                [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
This is it,your back's to the corner[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]             [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
This is it,don't be a fool anymore[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]            [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
This is it,The waiting is over[/tab]


   [Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]
No room to run,no way to hide[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Eb[/ch]
No time for wondering why[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]          [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
It's here,the moment is now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Edim7[/ch]          [ch]Eb/F[/ch]
About to decide[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#dim7[/ch]          [ch]Gm7[/ch]
Let him believe or leave him behind[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Eb[/ch]
But keep me near in your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]      [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
And know, whatever you do[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Eb/F[/ch]  [ch]F#dim7[/ch]
I'm here by your side[/tab]


   [Pre Chorus]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]C9[/ch]        [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]      [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch] [ch]Am7[/ch]
You said that maybe it's over[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]               [ch]Bbmaj9[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]
Not if you don't want it to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]Dm7[/ch]                [ch]Gm7[/ch]
For once in your life, here's your miracle[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]Dm7[/ch]
Stand up and fight[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Cm9[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]             [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
This is  it, make no mistake where you are[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]
This is it,your going no further[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]
Until it's over and done[/tab]


   [Bridge]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]         [ch]Dm7[/ch]                  [ch]Am7[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]
 No one can tell you for you know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm7[/ch]           [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]
Who makes the choice of how it goes[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Gsus4[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
It's not up to me this time[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Abmaj7[/ch]                     [ch]Gsus4[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
You know  there comes a day in every life[/tab]


   [Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dm9[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
This is  it, make no mistake where you are[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dm9[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
This is  it, you're going no further[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dm9[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
This is  it, until it's over and done[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dm9[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
This is  it, one way or another[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dm9[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]           [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
This is  it, no one can tell what the future knows[/tab]


    [Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dm9[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
This is  it, your back's to the corner[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dm9[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]        [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
This is  it, you make the choice of life[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dm9[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]       [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
This is  it, the waiting is over[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]Dm9[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
This is  it, no one can tell what the future knows[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]      [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]
This is  it[/tab]


Mark W
